description: Market shift extraction: systematic risks and tailwinds from financial news.

marketShifts.description: List of market shifts (risks and tailwinds).

type.description: RISK = systematic risk/headwind, TAILWIND = positive driver.

category.description: One of: GEOPOLITICAL, US_ECONOMIC_DATA, MONETARY_POLICY, FISCAL, EARNINGS_CORPORATE, SECTOR_STRUCTURAL, MARKET_SENTIMENT, COMMODITIES_SUPPLY, GLOBAL_GROWTH, CREDIT.

headline.description: Short descriptive title for the shift.

primaryChannel.description: Single primary macro channel: EQUITIES_US, CREDIT, VOL, RATES_SHORT, RATES_LONG, USD, OIL, GOLD, INFLATION, GLOBAL_RISK.

secondaryChannels.description: Secondary macro channels (same enum as primaryChannel).
